bird.name: Selva cacique
bird.summary: The Selva cacique (Cacicus koepckeae) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is endemic to Peru where its natural habitat consist…

locations.name: 乌卡亚利大区
locations.summary: 烏卡亞利大區（西班牙語：Departamento de Ucayali）是秘魯東部的一個大區，東鄰巴西，位於亞馬遜平原。烏卡亞利河—亞馬遜河的主要水源—流經本區，區名亦由此而來。面積101,830.64平方公里，2007年人口402,44…

locations.name: 库斯科大区
locations.summary: 庫斯科大區（西班牙語：Departamento del Cusco、克丘亞語：Qusqu suyu）是秘魯東南部的一個大區，北鄰烏卡亞利大區，東鄰馬德雷德迪奧斯和普諾大區，南鄰阿雷基帕大區，西鄰阿普里馬克、阿亞庫喬和胡寧大區。首府庫斯科，…

locations.name: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区
locations.summary: 馬德雷德迪奧斯大區（西班牙語：Departamento de Madre de Dios）是秘魯東南部的一個大區，地處亞馬遜平原之上，與普諾大區、庫斯科大區和烏卡亞利大區相鄰，東鄰巴西和玻利維亞。首府馬爾多納多港。 大區的名稱來自馬德雷德…

relations.subject: Selva cacique
relations.evidence: The Selva cacique is endemic to eastern Peru where it is found in the regions of Ucayali, Cusco and Madre de Dios, and the adjoining Acre State in northwestern Brazil

relations.subject: Selva cacique
relations.evidence: It is an uncommon and elusive bird and it is threatened by habitat destruction; the population is thought to be declining rapidly and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed the bird's conservation status as being "Near Threatened"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
